scripts.prepare:backend: cd ../backend && bun run prisma:generate:sqlite && tsc -p tsconfig.json && rm -rf dist/generated && cp -R src/generated dist/generated && cd ../desktop && node scripts/fix-contracts-esm.mjs
scripts.prepare:schema-sql: mkdir -p assets && cd ../backend && node scripts/check-schema-sync.mjs && DATABASE_URL=file:/tmp/mg-schema-dummy.db bunx prisma migrate diff --from-empty --to-schema-datamodel prisma/schema.sqlite.prisma --script > ../desktop/assets/schema.sql
scripts.prepare:assets: bun run prepare:schema-sql && mkdir -p dist/assets && cp assets/schema.sql dist/assets/schema.sql
scripts.build:electron: tsc -p tsconfig.json && cp src/preload.js dist/ && mkdir -p dist/auro && cp src/auro/page.html dist/auro/
scripts.build: bun run prepare:backend && bun run prepare:assets && bun run build:ui && bun run build:electron
scripts.dev: bun run prepare:backend && bun run prepare:assets && bun run build:electron && electron --no-sandbox .
